title: WorkerResource
description: Per-worker system resource snapshot capturing CPU, memory, and process telemetry for a running or recently completed worker task.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version pinned to 1. Consumers must reject records with a different version.

taskId.description: Unique identifier for the worker task, matching the heartbeat taskId.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this resource snapshot was captured.

issueNumber.description: GitHub issue number this task targets, if applicable.

pid.description: Operating system process ID of the worker.

state.description: Current process state from the OS scheduler.

uptimeMs.description: Milliseconds since the worker process started.

threadCount.description: Number of threads or handles held by the process.

fileDescriptorCount.description: Number of open file descriptors (Unix) or handles (Windows).

cpu.description: CPU usage metrics for the worker process.

usagePercent.description: Current CPU usage as a percentage (0-100). May exceed 100 on multi-core systems.

systemTimeMs.description: Cumulative system (kernel) CPU time in milliseconds.

userTimeMs.description: Cumulative user-space CPU time in milliseconds.

coresUsed.description: Effective number of CPU cores utilized (usagePercent / 100).

memory.description: Memory usage metrics for the worker process.

rssBytes.description: Resident Set Size — total physical memory allocated to the process, in bytes.

heapUsedBytes.description: V8 heap memory actively used, in bytes. Null for non-Node processes.

heapTotalBytes.description: V8 total heap size (committed), in bytes. Null for non-Node processes.

externalBytes.description: Memory used by C++ objects bound to JavaScript, in bytes.

arrayBufferBytes.description: Memory allocated for ArrayBuffers and SharedArrayBuffers, in bytes.

systemTotalBytes.description: Total physical memory on the host system, in bytes.

systemFreeBytes.description: Free physical memory on the host system, in bytes.

limits.description: Resource limits and thresholds for alerting. Null when no limits are configured.

maxRssBytes.description: Maximum RSS before the worker should be flagged for review.

maxHeapBytes.description: Maximum heap usage before the worker should be flagged.

maxFileDescriptors.description: Maximum open file descriptors before alerting.

alerts.description: Resource alerts triggered by threshold breaches. Null when no alerts are active.

metric.description: Which resource metric triggered the alert.

severity.description: Alert severity. warning = approaching limit, critical = exceeded limit.

currentValue.description: Current value of the metric that triggered the alert.
